mapper.select: SELECT PAGE_ID AS pageId, PAGE_NAME AS pageName, ROUTE_PATH AS routePath, DOMAIN_CODE AS domainCode, MENU_CODE AS menuCode, LAYOUT_VERSION AS layoutVersion, DESIGN_TOKEN_VERSION AS designTokenVersion, ACTIVE_YN AS activeYn FROM UI_PAGE_MANIFEST WHERE PAGE_ID = #{value}

SELECT PAGE_ID AS pageId, PAGE_NAME AS pageName, ROUTE_PATH AS routePath, DOMAIN_CODE AS domainCode, MENU_CODE AS menuCode, LAYOUT_VERSION AS layoutVersion, DESIGN_TOKEN_VERSION AS designTokenVersion, ACTIVE_YN AS activeYn FROM UI_PAGE_MANIFEST WHERE COALESCE(ACTIVE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY DOMAIN_CODE ASC, ROUTE_PATH ASC, PAGE_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO UI_PAGE_MANIFEST ( PAGE_ID, PAGE_NAME, ROUTE_PATH, DOMAIN_CODE, MENU_CODE, LAYOUT_VERSION, DESIGN_TOKEN_VERSION, ACTIVE_YN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{pageId}, #{pageName}, #{routePath}, #{domainCode}, #{menuCode}, #{layoutVersion}, #{designTokenVersion}, #{activeYn}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.update: UPDATE UI_PAGE_MANIFEST SET PAGE_NAME = #{pageName}, ROUTE_PATH = #{routePath}, DOMAIN_CODE = #{domainCode}, MENU_CODE = #{menuCode}, LAYOUT_VERSION = #{layoutVersion}, DESIGN_TOKEN_VERSION = #{designTokenVersion}, ACTIVE_YN = #{activeYn}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO UI_COMPONENT_REGISTRY ( COMPONENT_ID, COMPONENT_NAME, COMPONENT_TYPE, OWNER_DOMAIN, PROPS_SCHEMA_JSON, DESIGN_REFERENCE, ACTIVE_YN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{componentId}, #{componentName}, #{componentType}, #{ownerDomain}, #{propsSchemaJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{designReference}, #{activeYn}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.select: SELECT COMPONENT_ID AS componentId, COMPONENT_NAME AS componentName, COMPONENT_TYPE AS componentType, OWNER_DOMAIN AS ownerDomain, PROPS_SCHEMA_JSON AS propsSchemaJson, DESIGN_REFERENCE AS designReference, ACTIVE_YN AS activeYn, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(UPDATED_AT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS updatedAt FROM UI_COMPONENT_REGISTRY ORDER BY COMPONENT_TYPE ASC, COMPONENT_ID ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE UI_COMPONENT_REGISTRY SET COMPONENT_NAME = #{componentName}, COMPONENT_TYPE = #{componentType}, OWNER_DOMAIN = #{ownerDomain}, PROPS_SCHEMA_JSON = #{propsSchemaJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, DESIGN_REFERENCE = #{designReference}, ACTIVE_YN = #{activeYn}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE COMPONENT_ID = #{componentId}
UPDATE UI_PAGE_COMPONENT_MAP SET COMPONENT_ID = #{toComponentId}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE COMPONENT_ID = #{fromComponentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO UI_PAGE_COMPONENT_MAP ( MAP_ID, PAGE_ID, LAYOUT_ZONE, COMPONENT_ID, INSTANCE_KEY, DISPLAY_ORDER, CONDITIONAL_RULE_SUMMARY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{mapId}, #{pageId}, #{layoutZone}, #{componentId}, #{instanceKey}, #{displayOrder}, #{conditionalRuleSummary}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.select: SELECT MAP.MAP_ID AS mapId, MAP.PAGE_ID AS pageId, MAP.LAYOUT_ZONE AS layoutZone, MAP.COMPONENT_ID AS componentId, MAP.INSTANCE_KEY AS instanceKey, MAP.DISPLAY_ORDER AS displayOrder, MAP.CONDITIONAL_RULE_SUMMARY AS conditionalRuleSummary, REG.COMPONENT_NAME AS componentName, REG.COMPONENT_TYPE AS componentType, REG.OWNER_DOMAIN AS ownerDomain, REG.PROPS_SCHEMA_JSON AS propsSchemaJson, REG.DESIGN_REFERENCE AS designReference FROM UI_PAGE_COMPONENT_MAP MAP LEFT JOIN UI_COMPONENT_REGISTRY REG ON MAP.COMPONENT_ID = REG.COMPONENT_ID WHERE MAP.PAGE_ID = #{value} ORDER BY MAP.DISPLAY_ORDER ASC, MAP.INSTANCE_KEY ASC

SELECT MAN.PAGE_ID AS pageId, MAN.PAGE_NAME AS pageName, MAN.ROUTE_PATH AS routePath, MAN.MENU_CODE AS menuCode, MAP.LAYOUT_ZONE AS layoutZone, MAP.COMPONENT_ID AS componentId, MAP.INSTANCE_KEY AS instanceKey, MAP.DISPLAY_ORDER AS displayOrder, MAP.CONDITIONAL_RULE_SUMMARY AS conditionalRuleSummary FROM UI_PAGE_COMPONENT_MAP MAP INNER JOIN UI_PAGE_MANIFEST MAN ON MAP.PAGE_ID = MAN.PAGE_ID WHERE MAP.COMPONENT_ID = #{value} ORDER BY MAN.PAGE_ID ASC, MAP.DISPLAY_ORDER ASC, MAP.INSTANCE_KEY ASC
